packageRules.description: Group all non-major bumps into one PR
Auto-merge PEP 735 dev dependency-group minor/patch bumps
Icon collections: own group (so they can auto-merge independently of the shared non-major group) + 2-day release-age cooldown as a supply-chain guard before any bump PR.

Auto-merge minor/patch icon-collection bumps: CI's docker build runs fetch-icons.sh, so any upstream layout change fails the PR check before merge. Majors stay manual to eyeball glyph renames/removals, which otherwise degrade to silent blank strips (rendered HTTP 200, so CI can't catch them).
